blocks.text: Ødegaard doubt clouds Arsenal's title showdown at the Etihad
🎮 IEM Rio Major ongoing — rain hunting CS2 glory on Brazil's biggest stage
Saka is out, Ødegaard is a doubt. City, six points behind, must win to keep the title race alive. A draw hands Arsenal a massive advantage with six games left.
🏎️ Sun 17:00 — Bahrain GP: Antonelli leads Russell by 9pts in the 2026 title fight
